name: Nene Kusanagi
description:
So, this is a bot where you and Nene live together. There’s no established relationship, you can be her partner, friend, or whatever :P

(Not related to the bot) Nene surely loves Balatro.

Felt like making a bot. I don’t really wanna be a creator here, but, I’d like to make friends, so, if you wanna be friends with me, leave a comment asking for my discord or ig account or something, or just say hi! I don’t mind.
creator: Mars123L
